tagline: An architectural single-story masterpiece with panoramic fairway views in Escena Golf Club.
description: An architectural single-story masterpiece, this 2023-built home in Palm Springs's gated Escena Golf Club community pairs designer interiors with panoramic golf-course views. Soaring 17-foot ceilings, walls of glass, and an open great-room floor plan flood the home with natural light and frame two fairway vistas. The chef's kitchen features premium appliances, custom cabinetry, and a generous island; the spa-inspired primary suite offers a luxurious bath and a walk-in closet. Out back, a heated pool with electric cover anchors a low-maintenance landscape designed for the Coachella Valley climate. An 18-panel solar array paired with a Tesla Powerwall battery backup keeps utility costs low and provides whole-home resilience. A two-car attached garage and professionally maintained grounds round out a turnkey offering minutes from downtown Palm Springs, the airport, and PGA-caliber golf.
features: Walls of glass on the great room

tagline: A second-floor residence in Palm Springs's iconic Seven Lakes Country Club.
description: A second-floor residence in Palm Springs's iconic Seven Lakes Country Club, with a massive private balcony overlooking a lush central greenway and one of the community's sparkling pools. Seven Lakes is one of the most established golf communities in south Palm Springs, with mid-century architectural pedigree, a William F. Cody-designed clubhouse, and a setting that has long drawn buyers who appreciate classic desert design and the lifestyle that goes with it. Easy minutes to downtown Palm Canyon Drive, Smoke Tree Stables, and the Palm Springs International Airport.
features: Second-floor residence with massive private balcony
Minutes to downtown and the airport

tagline: A single-level Whitehawk home with a resort-style pool, spa, and firepit courtyard.
description: Single-level home ideally situated on a desirable corner lot in the Whitehawk community of Palm Desert, offering the best of indoor-outdoor desert living. A large enclosed front courtyard with a firepit creates a welcoming space for relaxing or entertaining. The resort-style backyard features a swimming pool and spa surrounded by mature, low-maintenance landscaping. Whitehawk's quiet streets sit minutes from El Paseo's shopping and dining, championship golf, and the Westfield Palm Desert.
features: Minutes to El Paseo shopping and dining

tagline: An extensively renovated 4-bedroom home in a fast-growing pocket of north Indio.
description: An extensively renovated 4-bedroom, 2-bath home in a desirable north Indio location. The interior has been thoughtfully updated for modern desert living, ready for a buyer who wants move-in convenience without the new-build price tag. North Indio is one of the Coachella Valley's fastest-growing submarkets, just minutes from the Empire Polo Club festival grounds and an easy drive to Old Town La Quinta — a combination of central location and value pricing that's been pulling more and more buyers east of the highway each year.
features: Minutes to the Empire Polo Club festival grounds
Easy drive to Old Town La Quinta

tagline: One of the last new-construction homes at Renata at Domani — Brownstone floor plan, corner location.
description: One of the last new-construction homes available at Renata at Domani — Pulte's gated community in north Palm Desert. This is the popular Brownstone floor plan in a coveted corner-lot location, finished with the modern, low-maintenance details that make recent-build desert homes so easy to live in. Renata sits in a quiet pocket of Palm Desert with quick connectivity to El Paseo, the Westfield Palm Desert, and the I-10 corridor — the kind of address that works equally well for full-time residents and seasonal buyers.
features: Quick connectivity to El Paseo and the I-10

tagline: New-construction 4-bedroom home with wide skies and mountain views in Desert Hot Springs.
description: A new-construction 4-bedroom, 3-bath home with the wide skies and mountain views that have made Desert Hot Springs one of the Coachella Valley's smartest entry points. The city is best known for its mineral hot springs and rapidly evolving neighborhoods — newer builds like this one are anchoring a wave of fresh investment along the valley's northern edge. Easy I-10 access connects you to all of Greater Palm Springs while the elevation here keeps summer evenings notably cooler than the valley floor.
features: Easy I-10 access to Greater Palm Springs
